message:
Merge pull request #58 from steipete/dependabot/github_actions/actions/checkout-6

chore(deps): bump actions/checkout from 5 to 6

files.patch:
@@ -21,7 +21,7 @@ jobs:
         
     steps:
     - name: Checkout code
-      uses: actions/checkout@v5
+      uses: actions/checkout@v6
       
     - name: Setup Node.js ${{ matrix.node-version }}
       uses: actions/setup-node@v6
@@ -64,7 +64,7 @@ jobs:
     
     steps:
     - name: Checkout code
-      uses: actions/checkout@v5
+      uses: actions/checkout@v6
       
     - name: Setup Node.js
       uses: actions/setup-node@v6
@@ -88,7 +88,7 @@ jobs:
     
     steps:
     - name: Checkout code
-      uses: actions/checkout@v5
+      uses: actions/checkout@v6
       
     - name: Setup Node.js
       uses: actions/setup-node@v6
@@ -147,7 +147,7 @@ jobs:
     
     steps:
     - name: Checkout code
-      uses: actions/checkout@v5
+      uses: actions/checkout@v6
       
     - name: Setup Xcode
       uses: maxim-lobanov/setup-xcode@v1

@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@ jobs:

-      uses: actions/checkout@v5

     - name: Setup Xcode

@@ -105,7 +105,7 @@ jobs:

-      uses: actions/checkout@v5
